sections.content: Interesting! The block moved! Looking at the image, the block is now at a lower position and seems to have moved LEFT into the charcoal corridor area. Let me check its exact position.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check block position after DOWN, DOWN, LEFT
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for node in seg['nodes']:
    if node['color'] == 'O':
        print(f"Orange: {node['boundary']}")
    if node['color'] == 'b' and node['pixels'] == 15:
        print(f"Blue: {node['boundary']}")

# Look at area around block
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("\nAround block (rows 40-52, cols 25-45):")
for i in range(40, 52):
    print(f"{i:2d}: {ascii_lines[i][25:45]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
